changes: Spinning Edge: Potency has been increased from 200 to 220.
Gust Slash: Combo potency has been increased from 300 to 330.
Aeolian Edge: Combo potency has been increased from 360 to 400. Rear combo potency has been increased from 420 to 460.
Shadow Fang: Combo potency has been increased from 200 to 220. Damage over time potency has been increased from 50 to 70.
Armor Crush: Combo potency has been increased from 330 to 380. Flank combo potency has been increased from 390 to 440.
Bunshin: Shadow attack potency has been adjusted based on the attack performed (Melee attack: 200, Ranged attack: 100, Area Attack: 100). Help text adjusted.
Hakaze: Potency has been increased from 170 to 200.
Jinpu: Combo potency has been increased from 320 to 340.
Shifu: Combo potency has been increased from 320 to 340.
Gekko: Combo potency has been increased from 470 to 480.
Kasha: Combo potency has been increased from 470 to 480.
Higanbana: Damage over time potency has been increased from 35 to 40.
Hissatsu: Kaiten: Recast time has been reduced from 5 seconds to 1 second.
Kaeshi: Higanbana: Damage over time potency has been increased from 52 to 60.
Ruin: Additional effects related to Bio/Miasma removed; base potency increased from 80 to 180.
Ruin II: Additional effects related to Bio/Miasma removed; base potency increased from 80 to 160.
Ruin III: Additional effects related to Bio/Miasma removed; base potency increased from 100 to 200.
Ruin IV: Additional effects related to Bio/Miasma removed; base potency increased from 120 to 260.

new_content.name: Mt. Gulg
new_content.description: Dungeon with adjusted ground appearance in certain areas.

new_content.name: Dungeons of Lyhe Ghiah
new_content.description: Content where duty could erroneously end in failure and chamber door selection issues occurred.

new_content.name: Doman mahjong
new_content.description: System feature where the probability of waits occurring after a discard has been reduced.

new_content.name: Free Company Submersibles
new_content.description: Exploratory mission system; units can no longer be deployed if speed is zero.

new_content.name: Housing
new_content.description: Housing is now available for free companies in the Spriggan and Twintania worlds.

glamour.name: Facet Mail of Fending
glamour.description: An item mentioned in the Resolved Issues and Known Issues sections regarding incorrect ingredients and desynthesis materials.

glamour.name: Darklight Cowl of Healing
glamour.description: An item mentioned in the Resolved Issues section regarding a display issue when equipped by Viera or Hrothgar.
